name: Goat Shaman
description: Ranged spellcaster. Fires projectiles from a distance, fragile up close.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon sorcerer in A-pose, lean build with elongated limbs, white wispy fur, twisted asymmetric horns with glowing rune carvings, holding a gnarled bone staff topped with a skull, wearing tattered dark robes with occult symbols, digitigrade goat legs, glowing green eyes, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Lean bipedal goat demon sorcerer, white fur, twisted horns with runes, bone staff with skull, tattered robes, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: White wispy fur, tattered dark fabric robes with embroidered symbols, bone staff with yellowed skull, glowing green rune carvings on horns
